title: Infosys completes merger of German step-down subsidiaries
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that the merger between two wholly owned step-down subsidiaries, Infosys Germany GmbH and Blitz 24-893 SE, was completed on September 24, 2025. The resultant entity is named Infosys Germany SE. The document does not disclose any transaction value, financial impact, ownership change, or strategic business impact.

key_facts.fact: The merger between Infosys Germany GmbH and Blitz 24-893 SE was completed on September 24, 2025.
Infosys Germany GmbH and Blitz 24-893 SE were described as wholly owned step down subsidiaries.
The name of the resultant entity is Infosys Germany SE.
